notes: FAIL_AUTH = engine 미실행, NOT a W5.4 regression. huggingface.co/chat 'Start chatting' redirects to OAuth consent (huggingface.co/oauth/authorize, client_id=8f1a1d63... scope inference-api/read-mcp/read-billing).
